title: The Unfinished Proof
relevance_summary: Groth16 misconfiguration leading to arbitrary withdrawal of funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that withdraws funds without proper verification of Groth16 constants

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that withdraws funds without proper verification of Groth16 constants
summary: FoomCash, a zero-knowledge proof-powered private lottery protocol, was exploited due to a misconfiguration of the Groth16 verifier, allowing attackers to withdraw funds without proper verification. A guard could have blocked such transactions by checking the Groth16 constants.
